data.title: Coursera Shares Tank After Disappointing Q1 Results, Guidance
data.description: Coursera, Inc. (NYSE: COUR) shared its first-quarter financial results post Thursday's market close, falling short of analyst predictions on earnings and providing guidance with a midpoint below expectations. In the report, Coursera revealed earnings of seven cents per share for the quarter, missing the anticipated eight cents and dropping from 12 cents reported in the corresponding period last year. The quarterly revenue stood at $195.7 million, surpassing the projected $195.05 million by analysts. Those interested in COUR stock can monitor its movements closely. For further details, the full article can be accessed on Benzinga's platform.

data.title: Aterian Provides Update on Strategic Alternatives Process
data.description: In Summit, New Jersey, on March 23, 2026, Aterian, Inc. (Nasdaq: ATER), a leading consumer products firm, released details regarding its ongoing Strategic Alternative Process.

data.title: Canadian Premium Sand Inc. Announces Option Grants
data.description: In Calgary, Alberta, on April 27, 2026, Canadian Premium Sand Inc. (TSXV: CPS) has disclosed the issuance of a total of 1,300,000 share options to purchase common shares of the company. These options, known as "Options," have been provided to executive officers and staff members of CPS in line with the regulations outlined in its omnibus equity incentive compensation plan (the "Plan").

data.title: MaxLinear Stock Rockets After Q1 Earnings: Here's Why
data.description: MaxLinear, Inc. (NASDAQ: MXL) released its first-quarter results, surpassing analyst expectations on both revenue and earnings. The company reported adjusted earnings of 22 cents per share, exceeding the estimated 18 cents per share. Their quarterly revenue stood at $137.19 million, beating the anticipated $135 million. CEO Kishore Seendripu expressed optimism about the future, citing the beginning of a multi-year growth phase driven by increased momentum in optical data center connectivity. Investors are advised to monitor MXL stock for potential price changes following the announcement. More details are available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Multitude Capital Oyj & Multitude AG bought back more outstanding capital notes. #finance #investment
data.description: In a recent update, it has been reported that the unemployment rate in the country has reached 6.9%, with a total of 10.7 million people currently out of work. This data reflects the ongoing economic challenges facing the nation, as businesses continue to struggle amid the pandemic. The government has implemented various relief measures to support those affected, but the road to recovery remains uncertain. Experts predict that it may take several years for the economy to fully bounce back from this crisis. Job seekers are advised to explore new opportunities and consider retraining in high-demand industries to improve their chances of finding employment in the current job market.

data.title: WallabyPhenox Restructures Debt and Accelerates Global Growth
data.description: WallabyPhenox has successfully secured funding to improve its financial position, boost international growth efforts, and progress key neurovascular clinical projects.

data.title: CPS Announces $514.07 Million Senior Subordinate Asset-Backed Securitization
data.description: On April 22, 2026, Consumer Portfolio Services, Inc. (Nasdaq: CPSS) completed its 59th senior subordinate securitization since 2011. This marks CPS's second term securitization in 2026 and the 42nd consecutive securitization to achieve a triple “A” rating on the senior notes from at least two rating agencies. The company has been consistent in receiving high ratings for its securitizations, demonstrating strong investor confidence in CPS's financial stability and performance over the years.

data.title: Xunlei Limited Announces Completion of Disposition of Majority Equity Interest in Shenzhen Onething
data.description: On March 16, 2026, in Shenzhen, China, Xunlei Limited (Nasdaq: XNET), a prominent technology firm offering distributed cloud services in China, shared that it has completed the sale of a majority stake in Shenzhen Onething Technology Co., Ltd. The Transaction, initially declared on March 3, 2026, has met all necessary requirements for closure. This development marks the successful finalization of the deal.

data.title: Applied Digital Stock Surges On $7.5B Hyperscaler Lease Deal
data.description: Shares of Applied Digital Corp (NASDAQ: APLD) surged as the company announced a significant lease agreement with a new U.S.-based high investment-grade hyperscaler. The lease, valued at approximately $7.5 billion over 15 years, is for 300 megawatts of critical IT load at its 430 MW Delta Forge 1 AI Factory campus. This deal is set to enhance revenue streams and diversify the customer base, focusing on supporting artificial intelligence and high-performance computing infrastructure. With this agreement, the hyperscaler becomes the second U.S. tenant across Applied Digital's AI Factory portfolio, totaling contracted lease revenue of over $23 billion. This move further diversifies the customer base with a third hyperscale tenant, consolidating Applied Digital as a top performer in today's market. Detailed coverage is available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Strider Announces 2026 Races, Including World Championship in Sarasota
data.description: Strider Bikes has revealed the exciting news of hosting two cute and thrilling balance bike races in the US in 2026. The inaugural Strider Cup Indoor Championship is set to take place in Box Elder, SD on August 15. The event aims to showcase young talents in the field of balance biking and is expected to draw a large audience. The Strider Cup World Championship will also be held, providing a global platform for young riders to compete. This announcement has sparked anticipation and excitement among biking enthusiasts, with notable dates and locations marked for these upcoming events.

data.title: Kiely Family of Companies Capitalized M. O'Herron Company
data.description: Kiely Family of Companies (KIELY) has recently disclosed that they have acquired M. O'Herron Company, a well-established utility contractor with a focus on natural gas distribution in the Pittsburgh Metro area and West Virginia. M. O'Herron Company, a family-owned business, has been renowned for its expertise in this field for many years. The acquisition marks a significant move for KIELY, signaling their expansion and strengthening their presence in the utility sector. This strategic acquisition will enable KIELY to enhance its services and reach a larger customer base in these regions.

data.title: Hyundai Motor America Reports April 2026 Sales
data.description: Sales of the recently released Palisade saw an 8% increase, setting a record high for the month of April. The sedan segment also performed well, with the Sonata experiencing an 18% surge and the Elantra increasing by 13%, marking new April records for both models. The IONIQ 5, known for its recent sales growth, saw a 6% increase in sales. Hybrid vehicles proved to be in high demand, growing by an impressive 52%, with the Sonata Hybrid achieving its best month ever.

data.title: NYSE Content Update: Artemis II Crew to Take Part in 'Bell Moment' at NYSE
data.description: The New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) issues a daily pre-market advisory from the trading floor. Published on May 1, 2026, investors can access valuable market insights before trading through this platform. This daily update offers crucial information to help navigate the market, enhancing trading strategies and decisions. Stay informed with the NYSE Pre-market update, ensuring you are equipped with essential data for successful trading.

data.title: P&M Air Conditioning & Heating Celebrates 80 Years of Service and Earns 11th Carrier President's Award
data.description: In 2025, P&M Air Conditioning & Heating, located in Houston, reached a significant milestone by completing 80 years of providing reliable services as a prominent heating and HVAC contractor in the Greater Houston region. This accomplishment underscores their longstanding commitment to quality service and customer satisfaction.

data.title: Orthodontic Details Names Industry Leaders Oliver Gelles and Dr. Anil Idiculla as Advisors Following Record Q1 Growth
data.description: Indianapolis-based supply management platform, Orthodontic Details, has welcomed renowned orthodontists Oliver Gelles and Dr. Anil to its team as it continues its rapid expansion. The platform, considered a leader in orthodontic supply management, made the announcement on May 1, 2026. These additions come at a crucial time as the platform's footprint grows.
